settings.title: Information We Collect
settings.text: We collect information you provide directly, including contact, shipping, and order details. We also collect limited technical data through cookies and analytics tools to improve site performance and shopping experience.

settings.title: How We Use Information
settings.text: Your information is used to process orders, provide customer support, send service communications, and improve our products and marketing. We do not sell your personal information.

settings.title: Email & Marketing Preferences
settings.text: If you subscribe to our emails, you may receive product updates, promotions, and fragrance launches. You can unsubscribe at any time using the link in any marketing email.

settings.title: Third-Party Services
settings.text: We use trusted third-party providers for payments, shipping, analytics, and subscription management. These providers only access data needed to perform their services.

settings.title: Your Privacy Rights
settings.text: Depending on your location, you may have rights related to access, correction, or deletion of personal data. Contact us to submit a privacy request.

settings.caption: Policy Information
settings.heading: Privacy Policy
settings.text: This policy explains what information Candles By Victoria collects and exactly how we use and protect it.
